title: castilleja pallida var. pallida
intro: Castilleja pallida var. pallida, also known as pale Indian paintbrush, is a perennial plant belonging to the Orobanchaceae family. It is a hemiparasitic plant that derives some of its nutrients by tapping into the roots of surrounding plants. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Castilleja pallida var. pallida include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal use.
